title: St Peter Law Offices ransomware incident

extortion.description: St. Peter O’Brien Law Offices, P.C. is a law firm that specializes in various areas of law, including adoption, business formationand compliance, estate planning, real estate, tax law, general litigation, and guardianships.We are ready to upload 188gb of corporate documents. Employee personal documents (DLs, financials and other docs), customer files (DLs, SSN numbers, credit card details, payment details, medical records and so on), project information, financial and accountinginformation, NDAs, etc.
